titleStmt.title: SII 9.373: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 373. (A.R. No. 488 of 1914.) ON A NANDI-PILLAR LYING IN A FIELD TO THE SOUTH-EAST OF THE VILLAGE HYARADA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1184, Dundubhi, Chaitra, ba. amāvāse, Sōmavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa. The date intended was probably A.D. 1263 April 9 Monday; the cyclic year was Rudhirōdgārin and there was no eclipse. The record belongs to the reign of the Yādava king Mahādēvarāya and seems to record that the Mahāpasāyita Daḷavayya • • • • Sōyidēva made a gift of the village Heraḍa for the service of the god Mallikārjunadēva at Śrīparvata. The geographical division Beṇṇevūru twelve is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśirastuṁgacaṁdracāmaracāravē trai
mūlastaṁbāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti śrīsakavarusada 1184 neya duṁdubhisaṁ
vatsarada caitra bahuḷa Amāvāse sōmavāra sū
ryyagrahaṇanimittaṁ svasti śrīmatu yāda
vanārāyaṇa bhujabaḷapratāpacakravartti
śrīvīramahādēvarāyana tatupādapadmō
pajīvi śrīmanumahāpasāyitaṁ daḷava
yyama sōyidēvanu śrī śrīparvvatada śrī
svayaṁbhuliṁga śrīmallikārjju
namahā bhōga
khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnō
paṭimāḍida beṁṇevū
ru haṁneraḍa heraḍava
nu sarvvana vānasiddha
cakravartti suputra
puluvurada he pāda
prakṣālanaṁgeydu ttamaṁ
koṭṭu dhārā māḍiko
ṭṭa dattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasu ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ . svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pa
radattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahā
svadattaṁ niḥphalaṁ bhavētu . maṁgaḷa ma
hāśrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.373 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
